title: Craft Spawners and selected Monster Eggs
description: Vanilla+ crafting recipes utilising mob heads.
body:
Adds, (as much as they can be) **vanilla friendly**, crafting recipes for **Mob Spawners** (totem of undying and experience bottles) and a selection (listed below) of Monster **Spawn Eggs**, giving as such a practical use to mob heads. These mobs include:
1. zombie
2. husk
3. drowned
4. zombie villager
5. skeleton
6. stray
7. bogged
8. parched
9. wither skeleton
10. piglin
11. witch
12. creeper

 These specific mobs were the only ones that it made sense to include provided the limited variety of mob heads in the game. For the recipes **check the project's Gallery**! 
 
 ![image text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b333018085e0da16d094211998c21a1d32053f4_0.webp)
>  0 AI was used.
